class.name: OpenXRBindingModifier
class.description: Binding modifier base class. Subclasses implement various modifiers that alter how an OpenXR runtime processes inputs.

method.name: get_binding_modifier_type
method.description: Returns the scope of this binding modifier.

members.member: Action related to this binding modifier. Only applicable if [method get_binding_modifier_type] returns [constant BINDING_MODIFIER_IO_ACTION].
Input path related to this binding modifier. Only applicable if [method get_binding_modifier_type] returns [constant BINDING_MODIFIER_IO_PATH] or [constant BINDING_MODIFIER_IO_ACTION].

constants.constant: This binding modifier applies to the entire suggested interaction binding.
This binding modifier applies to a specific input path for the suggested interaction binding.
This binding modifier applies to an action bound to a specific input path for the suggested interaction binding.
